<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#FC8019">
  <title>RestroSuite KDS | Kitchen Display</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="dashboard-styles.css?v=2.6">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
  <script>
    (function() {
      var user = sessionStorage.getItem('logged_in_user');
      var role = sessionStorage.getItem('logged_in_role');
      if (!user) {
        window.location.replace('login.html');
        return;
      }
      document.documentElement.classList.add('role-' + (role || 'kitchen'));
      document.documentElement.classList.add('kds-fullscreen');
    })();
  </script>
  <style>
    /* KDS Fullscreen Styles */
    html.kds-fullscreen body {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: #172033;
    }
    html.kds-fullscreen .sidebar,
    html.kds-fullscreen .mobile-bottom-nav,
    html.kds-fullscreen .header-container,
    html.kds-fullscreen .tab-content:not(#kds-tab) {
      display: none !important;
    }
    html.kds-fullscreen #kds-tab {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      bottom: 0;
      display: flex !important;
      flex-direction: column;
      padding: 16px;

      position: fixed;
      top: 12px;
      right: 12px;
      z-index: 9999;

      color: white;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .exit-fullscreen-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(252, 128, 25, 0.9);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="dark-theme">
  <button class="exit-fullscreen-btn" onclick="window.location.href='dashboard.html'">
    <i class="fas fa-times"></i> Exit KDS
  </button>

  <!-- Inject dashboard content for KDS -->
  <div id="dashboard-inject"></div>

  <script>
    // Load the dashboard and extract only the KDS tab
    fetch('dashboard.html')
      .then(response => response.text())
      .then(html => {
        const parser = new DOMParser();
        const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
        
        // Copy KDS tab content
        const kdsTab = doc.getElementById('kds-tab');
        if (kdsTab) {
          document.getElementById('dashboard-inject').innerHTML = kdsTab.outerHTML;
          document.getElementById('kds-tab').classList.add('active');
        }

        // Copy necessary scripts
        const scripts = doc.querySelectorAll('script');
        scripts.forEach(script => {
          if (script.src && script.src.includes('dashboard')) {
            const newScript = document.createElement('script');
            newScript.src = script.src;
            document.body.appendChild(newScript);
          }
        });
      })
      .catch(err => {
        console.error('Failed to load dashboard:', err);
        window.location.href = 'dashboard.html';
      });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#FC8019">
  <title>RestroSuite KDS | Kitchen Display</title>
  <link rel="icon" href="assets/restrosuite-mark.png?v=3" type="image/png">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="dashboard-styles.css?v=2.6">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
  <script>
    (function() {
      var user = sessionStorage.getItem('logged_in_user');
      var role = sessionStorage.getItem('logged_in_role');
      if (!user) {
        window.location.replace('login.html');
        return;
      }
      document.documentElement.classList.add('role-' + (role || 'kitchen'));
      document.documentElement.classList.add('kds-fullscreen');
    })();
  </script>
  <style>
    /* KDS Fullscreen Styles */
    html.kds-fullscreen body {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: #172033;
    }
    html.kds-fullscreen .sidebar,
    html.kds-fullscreen .mobile-bottom-nav,

      position: fixed;
      top: 12px;
      right: 12px;
      z-index: 9999;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      background: rgba(23, 32, 51, 0.9);
      color: white;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .exit-fullscreen-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(252, 128, 25, 0.9);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="dark-theme">
  <button class="exit-fullscreen-btn" onclick="window.location.href='dashboard.html'">
    <i class="fas fa-times"></i> Exit KDS
  </button>

  <!-- Inject dashboard content for KDS -->
  <div id="dashboard-inject"></div>

  <script>
    // Load the dashboard and extract only the KDS tab
    fetch('dashboard.html')
      .then(response => response.text())
      .then(html => {
        const parser = new DOMParser();
        const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
        
        // Copy KDS tab content
        const kdsTab = doc.getElementById('kds-tab');
        if (kdsTab) {
          document.getElementById('dashboard-inject').innerHTML = kdsTab.outerHTML;
          document.getElementById('kds-tab').classList.add('active');
        }

        // Copy necessary scripts
        const scripts = doc.querySelectorAll('script');
        scripts.forEach(script => {
          if (script.src && script.src.includes('dashboard')) {
            const newScript = document.createElement('script');
            newScript.src = script.src;

  <!-- Inject dashboard content for Tokens -->
  <div id="dashboard-inject"></div>

  <script>
    // Load the dashboard and extract only the Tokens tab
    fetch('dashboard.html')
      .then(response => response.text())
      .then(html => {
        const parser = new DOMParser();
        const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
        
        // Copy Tokens tab content
        const tokensTab = doc.getElementById('tokens-tab');
        if (tokensTab) {
          document.getElementById('dashboard-inject').innerHTML = tokensTab.outerHTML;
          document.getElementById('tokens-tab').classList.add('active');
        }

        // Copy necessary scripts
        const scripts = doc.querySelectorAll('script');
        scripts.forEach(script => {
          if (script.src && script.src.includes('dashboard')) {
            const newScript = document.createElement('script');
            newScript.src = script.src;
            document.body.appendChild(newScript);
          }
        });
      })
      .catch(err => {
        console.error('Failed to load dashboard:', err);
        window.location.href = 'dashboard.html';
      });
  </script>
</body>

    // Load the dashboard and extract only the Tokens tab
    fetch('dashboard.html')
      .then(response => response.text())
      .then(html => {
        const parser = new DOMParser();
        const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');

        if (tokensTab) {

          document.getElementById('tokens-tab').classList.add('active');

  <script>
    (function() {
      'use strict';

      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const slug = params.get('tenant') || params.get('outlet') || '';
      const table = params.get('table') || '';

      if (!slug) {
        document.body.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center; padding: 80px 20px; font-family:sans-serif;">' +
          '<i class="fa-solid fa-qrcode" style="font-size:64px; color:#FF6B00; margin-bottom:16px;"></i>' +
          '<h2>No Restaurant Context</h2><p style="color:#666; margin-top:8px;">Please scan the table QR code to start dining.</p></div>';
        return;
      }

      // Configure Menu Button Redirect
      document.getElementById('menu-btn').href = `order.html?tenant=${slug}&table=${table}`;
      document.getElementById('table-label').textContent = table ? `Table ${table.padStart(2, '0')}` : 'Takeaway';

      // Load Config variables
      let SU = '';
      let SK = '';
      let FN = '';

      const configPromise = (window.__configReady || Promise.resolve()).then(() => {
        SU = window.__SUPABASE_URL__ || '';
        SK = window.__SUPABASE_ANON_KEY__ || '';
        FN = (window.location.hostname === 'localhost' || window.location.hostname === '127.0.0.1')
          ? '/functions/v1/tenant-public'
          : (SU ? SU + '/functions/v1/tenant-public' : '');
      });

      let upiVpaAddress = "";

      // API Caller helper
      function apiCall(action, extra) {
        return configPromise.then(() => {
          if (!FN) return Promise.reject(new Error('Backend endpoint config missing'));
          return fetch(FN, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
              'Content-Type': 'application/json',
              'apikey': SK,
              'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + SK
            },
            body: JSON.stringify(Object.assign({ action, tenant_slug: slug }, extra || {}))
          }).then(res => res.json().catch(() => ({})));
        });
      }

      // Load business profile brand
      function initBranding() {
        apiCall('list_menu')
          .then(res => {
            if (res.tenantName) {
              document.getElementById('brand-logo').textContent = res.tenantName.toUpperCase();
              document.title = `${res.tenantName} - Dining Portal`;
            }
            if (res.upiVpa) {
              upiVpaAddress = res.upiVpa;
            }
          })
          .catch(err => console.error("Branding failed to fetch:", err));
      }
      
      configPromise.then(() => {
        initBranding();
      });

      // Modal management
      window.openModal = function(id) {
        document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
        if (id === 'tracker-modal') {
          pollOrderTrackers();
        } else if (id === 'checkout-modal') {
          renderCheckoutSummary();
        }
      };

      window.closeModal = function(id) {
        document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('active');
      };

      window.closeModalOnBg = function(e, id) {
        if (e.target.id === id) closeModal(id);
      };

      // Toast feedback
      function showToast(msg) {
        const t = document.getElementById('toast');
        document.getElementById('toast-message').textContent = msg;
        t.classList.add('show');
        setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2500);
      }

      // Send Service Alerts
      window.sendServiceRequest = function(requestName, icon) {
        const text = `${requestName} ${icon}`;
        closeModal('service-modal');

        apiCall('create_notification', {
          title: `Table ${table} Call`,
          message: `Dine-in Customer requested: ${requestName}`,
          type: 'waiter_call'
        })
        .then(res => {
          if (res.success) {
            showToast(`Paging Waiter for ${requestName}...`);
          } else {
            showToast("Server busy. Please call waiter manually.");
          }
        })
        .catch(() => showToast("Connection failed. Try again."));
      };

      // Track order polling
      function getPendingOrderList() {
        try {
          return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('doppio_pending_qr_orders') || '[]');
        } catch(e) {
          return [];
        }
      }

      function pollOrderTrackers() {
        const orderList = getPendingOrderList();
        const box = document.getElementById('tracker-box');

        if (!orderList.length) {
          box.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">No active orders tracked on this phone.</p>`;
          return;
        }

        // Fetch the status of the most recent order in list
        const latestOrder = orderList[orderList.length - 1];
        box.innerHTML = `<div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; padding:30px;"><div class="spin" style="width:24px; height:24px; border:2px solid var(--border); border-top-color:var(--brand); border-radius:50%; animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;"></div></div>`;

        apiCall('get_order_status', { orderId: latestOrder.orderId })
          .then(res => {
            if (res.error) {
              box.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">Could not verify order status. (${res.error})</p>`;
              return;
            }

            const ord = res.order;
            const status = ord.status || 'Pending Review';

            const steps = [
              { key: 'Pending Review', title: 'Order Placed', desc: 'Received at cashier. Waiting for approval.' },
              { key: 'Preparing', title: 'Preparing in Kitchen', desc: 'Chef has started cooking your food.' },
              { key: 'Served', title: 'Served Hot', desc: 'Food is delivered to your table. Enjoy!' },
              { key: 'Paid', title: 'Paid & Settled', desc: 'Payment received. Thank you!' }
            ];

            let activeIndex = 0;
            if (status === 'Preparing') activeIndex = 1;
            else if (status === 'Served') activeIndex = 2;
            else if (status === 'Paid') activeIndex = 3;

            let timelineHtml = steps.map((st, idx) => {
              let cls = '';
              if (idx < activeIndex) cls = 'done';
              else if (idx === activeIndex) cls = 'active';

              return `<div class="timeline-step ${cls}">
                <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
                <div class="step-title">${st.title}</div>
                <div class="step-desc">${st.desc}</div>
              </div>`;
            }).join('');

            box.innerHTML = `
              <div style="font-weight:700; font-size:15px; margin-bottom:10px; color:var(--brand);">Order: ${latestOrder.orderId}</div>
              <div class="timeline">${timelineHtml}</div>
            `;
          })
          .catch(() => {
            box.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">Offline. Check connection.</p>`;
          });
      }

      // Self Checkout Summary
      function renderCheckoutSummary() {
        const orderList = getPendingOrderList();
        const checkoutBox = document.getElementById('checkout-box');

        if (!orderList.length) {
          checkoutBox.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">No running orders found to pay.</p>`;
          return;
        }

        const runningTotal = orderList.reduce((sum, ord) => sum + Number(ord.total || 0), 0);

        if (runningTotal <= 0) {
          checkoutBox.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">Your bill is settled.</p>`;
          return;
        }

        const upiVpa = upiVpaAddress || "merchant@upi"; // Fallback VPA
        const upiName = document.getElementById('brand-logo').textContent || "Doppio Cafe";
        const latestOrder = orderList[orderList.length - 1];

        // Format UPI deep link
        const upiUrl = `upi://pay?pa=${upiVpa}&pn=${encodeURIComponent(upiName)}&am=${runningTotal.toFixed(2)}&tr=${latestOrder.orderId}&tn=Table%20${table}%20Bill&cu=INR`;
        const qrCodeApiUrl = `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=250x250&data=${encodeURIComponent(upiUrl)}`;

        checkoutBox.innerHTML = `
          <div class="bill-summary">
            <div class="bill-row">
              <span>Running Bill (Table ${table})</span>
              <span>₹${runningTotal}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="bill-row bill-total">
              <span>Grand Total</span>
              <span>₹${runningTotal}</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="upi-box">
            <p style="font-size:13px; color:var(--text-muted); text-align:center;">Scan below to pay directly via any UPI app</p>
            <div class="qr-container">
              <img src="${qrCodeApiUrl}" class="qr-img" alt="UPI QR Code">
            </div>
            <a href="${upiUrl}" class="btn" style="text-decoration:none;"><i class="fa-solid fa-mobile-screen-button"></i> Pay via UPI App</a>
          </div>

          <div class="utr-form">
            <p style="font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-muted);">After payment, enter the 12-digit UTR/Ref code to auto-verify:</p>
            <input type="number" class="input-field" id="utr-input" placeholder="e.g. 123456789012" minlength="12" maxlength="12">
            <button class="btn" onclick="submitUtrCode('${latestOrder.orderId}')" style="background:#111827;"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i> Submit UTR Code</button>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      window.submitUtrCode = function(orderId) {
        const val = document.getElementById('utr-input').value.trim();
        if (val.length !== 12) {
          showToast("Please enter a valid 12-digit UTR/Ref code.");
          return;
        }

        apiCall('create_notification', {
          title: `Table ${table} Payment Check`,
          message: `UTR submitted: ${val} for Order ID: ${orderId}`,
          type: 'payment_alert'
        })
        .then(res => {
          if (res.success) {
            showToast("UTR code submitted. Waiting for cashier approval.");
            closeModal('checkout-modal');
          } else {
            showToast("Failed to submit verification. Try again.");
          }
        })
        .catch(() => showToast("Connection failed. Try again."));
      };

      // Handle offline status alerts
      window.addEventListener('online', () => document.getElementById('offline-banner').style.display = 'none');
      window.addEventListener('offline', () => document.getElementById('offline-banner').style.display = 'flex');

    })();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

<body>

  <div class="portal-container">
    <!-- Offline Banner -->
    <div class="offline-banner" id="offline-banner">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-cloud-showers-water"></i> Offline Mode - Verification will retry when connected
    </div>

    <!-- Header Box -->
    <div class="portal-header">
      <div class="brand-logo" id="brand-logo">RESTRONAME</div>
      <div class="outlet-name" id="outlet-name">Dine-In Operations</div>
      <div class="table-badge">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-chair"></i> <span id="table-label">Table --</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Grid Actions -->
    <div class="portal-grid">
      <!-- Menu Order -->
      <a href="#" class="portal-card" id="menu-btn">
        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-utensils"></i></div>
        <div class="card-title">View Menu & Order</div>
        <div class="card-desc">Browse dishes, customize and send orders to kitchen</div>
      </a>

      <!-- Call Waiter -->
      <div class="portal-card" onclick="openModal('service-modal')">
        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-bell"></i></div>
        <div class="card-title">Service Requests</div>
        <div class="card-desc">Call captain, request water, cutlery or clear table</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Live Order Tracker -->
      <div class="portal-card" onclick="openModal('tracker-modal')">
        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-hourglass-half"></i></div>
        <div class="card-title">Track Live Order</div>
        <div class="card-desc">Check kitchen status of your table orders</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Checkout / Pay -->
      <div class="portal-card" onclick="openModal('checkout-modal')">
        <div class="card-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-credit-card"></i></div>
        <div class="card-title">Pay Bill / Pay Later</div>
        <div class="card-desc">Check running total and pay using UPI QR</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- SERVICE REQUESTS MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="service-modal" onclick="closeModalOnBg(event, 'service-modal')">
    <div class="modal-sheet">
      <div class="modal-hdr">
        <span class="modal-title">Request Table Service</span>
        <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('service-modal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
      </div>
      <div class="service-grid">
        <button class="service-btn" onclick="sendServiceRequest('Drinking Water', '💧')">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-glass-water"></i> Bring Water
        </button>
        <button class="service-btn" onclick="sendServiceRequest('Cutlery / Plates', '🍴')">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-utensils"></i> Need Cutlery
        </button>
        <button class="service-btn" onclick="sendServiceRequest('Clear Table', '🧹')">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-broom"></i> Clear Table
        </button>
        <button class="service-btn" onclick="sendServiceRequest('General Assistant', '🙋')">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-hand"></i> Call Waiter
        </button>
        <button class="service-btn" onclick="sendServiceRequest('Request Printed Bill', '🧾')">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-receipt"></i> Request Bill
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- LIVE TRACKER MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="tracker-modal" onclick="closeModalOnBg(event, 'tracker-modal')">
    <div class="modal-sheet">
      <div class="modal-hdr">
        <span class="modal-title">Live Order Tracker</span>
        <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('tracker-modal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
      </div>
      <div class="tracker-box" id="tracker-box">
        <!-- Rendered dynamically -->
        <p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">No active orders tracked on this phone.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CHECKOUT MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="checkout-modal" onclick="closeModalOnBg(event, 'checkout-modal')">
    <div class="modal-sheet">
      <div class="modal-hdr">
        <span class="modal-title">Table Self-Checkout</span>
        <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('checkout-modal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
      </div>
      <div id="checkout-box">
        <!-- Rendered dynamically -->
        <p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">No running orders found to pay.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Feedback Toast -->
  <div class="toast" id="toast">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> <span id="toast-message">Request sent successfully!</span>
  </div>

  <script>
    (function() {
      'use strict';

      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const slug = params.get('tenant') || params.get('outlet') || '';
      const table = params.get('table') || '';

      if (!slug) {
        document.body.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center; padding: 80px 20px; font-family:sans-serif;">' +
          '<i class="fa-solid fa-qrcode" style="font-size:64px; color:#FF6B00; margin-bottom:16px;"></i>' +
          '<h2>No Restaurant Context</h2><p style="color:#666; margin-top:8px;">Please scan the table QR code to start dining.</p></div>';
        return;
      }

      // Configure Menu Button Redirect
      document.getElementById('menu-btn').href = `order.html?tenant=${slug}&table=${table}`;
      document.getElementById('table-label').textContent = table ? `Table ${table.padStart(2, '0')}` : 'Takeaway';

      // Load Config variables
      let SU = '';
      let SK = '';
      let FN = '';

      const configPromise = (window.__configReady || Promise.resolve()).then(() => {
        SU = window.__SUPABASE_URL__ || '';
        SK = window.__SUPABASE_ANON_KEY__ || '';
        FN = (window.location.hostname === 'localhost' || window.location.hostname === '127.0.0.1')
          ? '/functions/v1/tenant-public'
          : (SU ? SU + '/functions/v1/tenant-public' : '');
      });

      let upiVpaAddress = "";

      // API Caller helper
      function apiCall(action, extra) {
        return configPromise.then(() => {
          if (!FN) return Promise.reject(new Error('Backend endpoint config missing'));
          return fetch(FN, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
              'Content-Type': 'application/json',
              'apikey': SK,
              'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + SK
            },
            body: JSON.stringify(Object.assign({ action, tenant_slug: slug }, extra || {}))
          }).then(res => res.json().catch(() => ({})));
        });
      }

      // Load business profile brand
      function initBranding() {
        apiCall('list_menu')
          .then(res => {
            if (res.tenantName) {
              document.getElementById('brand-logo').textContent = res.tenantName.toUpperCase();
              document.title = `${res.tenantName} - Dining Portal`;
            }
            if (res.upiVpa) {
              upiVpaAddress = res.upiVpa;
            }
          })
          .catch(err => console.error("Branding failed to fetch:", err));
      }
      
      configPromise.then(() => {
        initBranding();
      });

      // Modal management
      window.openModal = function(id) {
        document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
        if (id === 'tracker-modal') {
          pollOrderTrackers();
        } else if (id === 'checkout-modal') {
          renderCheckoutSummary();
        }
      };

      window.closeModal = function(id) {
        document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('active');
      };

      window.closeModalOnBg = function(e, id) {
        if (e.target.id === id) closeModal(id);
      };

      // Toast feedback
      function showToast(msg) {
        const t = document.getElementById('toast');
        document.getElementById('toast-message').textContent = msg;
        t.classList.add('show');
        setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2500);
      }

      // Send Service Alerts
      window.sendServiceRequest = function(requestName, icon) {
        const text = `${requestName} ${icon}`;
        closeModal('service-modal');

        apiCall('create_notification', {
          title: `Table ${table} Call`,
          message: `Dine-in Customer requested: ${requestName}`,
          type: 'waiter_call'
        })
        .then(res => {
          if (res.success) {
            showToast(`Paging Waiter for ${requestName}...`);
          } else {
            showToast("Server busy. Please call waiter manually.");
          }
        })
        .catch(() => showToast("Connection failed. Try again."));
      };

      // Track order polling
      function getPendingOrderList() {
        try {
          return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('doppio_pending_qr_orders') || '[]');
        } catch(e) {
          return [];
        }
      }

      function pollOrderTrackers() {
        const orderList = getPendingOrderList();
        const box = document.getElementById('tracker-box');

        if (!orderList.length) {
          box.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">No active orders tracked on this phone.</p>`;
          return;
        }

        // Fetch the status of the most recent order in list
        const latestOrder = orderList[orderList.length - 1];
        box.innerHTML = `<div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; padding:30px;"><div class="spin" style="width:24px; height:24px; border:2px solid var(--border); border-top-color:var(--brand); border-radius:50%; animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;"></div></div>`;

        apiCall('get_order_status', { orderId: latestOrder.orderId })
          .then(res => {
            if (res.error) {
              box.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">Could not verify order status. (${res.error})</p>`;
              return;
            }

            const ord = res.order;
            const status = ord.status || 'Pending Review';

            const steps = [
              { key: 'Pending Review', title: 'Order Placed', desc: 'Received at cashier. Waiting for approval.' },
              { key: 'Preparing', title: 'Preparing in Kitchen', desc: 'Chef has started cooking your food.' },
              { key: 'Served', title: 'Served Hot', desc: 'Food is delivered to your table. Enjoy!' },
              { key: 'Paid', title: 'Paid & Settled', desc: 'Payment received. Thank you!' }
            ];

            let activeIndex = 0;
            if (status === 'Preparing') activeIndex = 1;
            else if (status === 'Served') activeIndex = 2;
            else if (status === 'Paid') activeIndex = 3;

            let timelineHtml = steps.map((st, idx) => {
              let cls = '';
              if (idx < activeIndex) cls = 'done';
              else if (idx === activeIndex) cls = 'active';

              return `<div class="timeline-step ${cls}">
                <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
                <div class="step-title">${st.title}</div>
                <div class="step-desc">${st.desc}</div>
              </div>`;
            }).join('');

            box.innerHTML = `
              <div style="font-weight:700; font-size:15px; margin-bottom:10px; color:var(--brand);">Order: ${latestOrder.orderId}</div>
              <div class="timeline">${timelineHtml}</div>
            `;
          })
          .catch(() => {
            box.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">Offline. Check connection.</p>`;
          });
      }

      // Self Checkout Summary
      function renderCheckoutSummary() {
        const orderList = getPendingOrderList();
        const checkoutBox = document.getElementById('checkout-box');

        if (!orderList.length) {
          checkoutBox.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">No running orders found to pay.</p>`;
          return;
        }

        const runningTotal = orderList.reduce((sum, ord) => sum + Number(ord.total || 0), 0);

        if (runningTotal <= 0) {
          checkoutBox.innerHTML = `<p style="color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; padding: 20px;">Your bill is settled.</p>`;
          return;
        }

        const upiVpa = upiVpaAddress || "merchant@upi"; // Fallback VPA
        const upiName = document.getElementById('brand-logo').textContent || "Doppio Cafe";
        const latestOrder = orderList[orderList.length - 1];

        // Format UPI deep link
        const upiUrl = `upi://pay?pa=${upiVpa}&pn=${encodeURIComponent(upiName)}&am=${runningTotal.toFixed(2)}&tr=${latestOrder.orderId}&tn=Table%20${table}%20Bill&cu=INR`;
        const qrCodeApiUrl = `https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=250x250&data=${encodeURIComponent(upiUrl)}`;

        checkoutBox.innerHTML = `
          <div class="bill-summary">
            <div class="bill-row">
              <span>Running Bill (Table ${table})</span>
              <span>₹${runningTotal}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="bill-row bill-total">
              <span>Grand Total</span>
              <span>₹${runningTotal}</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="upi-box">
            <p style="font-size:13px; color:var(--text-muted); text-align:center;">Scan below to pay directly via any UPI app</p>
            <div class="qr-container">
              <img src="${qrCodeApiUrl}" class="qr-img" alt="UPI QR Code">
            </div>
            <a href="${upiUrl}" class="btn" style="text-decoration:none;"><i class="fa-solid fa-mobile-screen-button"></i> Pay via UPI App</a>
          </div>

          <div class="utr-form">
            <p style="font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-muted);">After payment, enter the 12-digit UTR/Ref code to auto-verify:</p>
            <input type="number" class="input-field" id="utr-input" placeholder="e.g. 123456789012" minlength="12" maxlength="12">
            <button class="btn" onclick="submitUtrCode('${latestOrder.orderId}')" style="background:#111827;"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i> Submit UTR Code</button>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      window.submitUtrCode = function(orderId) {
        const val = document.getElementById('utr-input').value.trim();
        if (val.length !== 12) {
          showToast("Please enter a valid 12-digit UTR/Ref code.");
          return;
        }

        apiCall('create_notification', {
          title: `Table ${table} Payment Check`,
          message: `UTR submitted: ${val} for Order ID: ${orderId}`,
          type: 'payment_alert'
        })
        .then(res => {
          if (res.success) {
            showToast("UTR code submitted. Waiting for cashier approval.");
            closeModal('checkout-modal');
          } else {
            showToast("Failed to submit verification. Try again.");
          }
        })
        .catch(() => showToast("Connection failed. Try again."));
      };

      // Handle offline status alerts
      window.addEventListener('online', () => document.getElementById('offline-banner').style.display = 'none');
      window.addEventListener('offline', () => document.getElementById('offline-banner').style.display = 'flex');

    })();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

    .drawer-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; }
    .drawer-tag { background: rgba(255,107,0,0.08); color: var(--brand); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 50px; }
    .close-btn { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--surface-alt); border: none; color: var(--text2); font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: var(--tr); }
    .close-btn:hover { background: rgba(17,24,39,0.08); }
    .cart-list { padding: 10px 20px; }
    .cart-empty { text-align: center; padding: 36px; color: var(--muted); }
    .cart-empty i { font-size: 36px; margin-bottom: 10px; display: block; opacity: 0.35; }
    .cart-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 11px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .cart-info { flex: 1; }
    .cart-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; }
    .cart-unit { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); }
    .cart-ctrl { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .cc-btn { width: 27px; height: 27px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface-alt); color: var(--text); font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
    .cc-btn.p { background: var(--brand); border-color: var(--brand); color: #fff; }
    .cc-qty { font-weight: 700; min-width: 18px; text-align: center; font-size: 13px; }
    .cart-total { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; color: var(--brand); min-width: 52px; text-align: right; font-size: 14px; }

    /* CUSTOMER FORM */
    .cust-form { padding: 14px 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .cust-form h4 { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 10px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; }
    .field { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: var(--surface-alt); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--r-sm); padding: 10px 13px; margin-bottom: 9px; transition: var(--tr); }
    .field:focus-within { border-color: var(--brand); background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 107, 0, 0.15); }
    .field i { color: var(--muted); font-size: 13px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .field input { background: none; border: none; color: var(--text); font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; flex: 1; outline: none; }
    .field input::placeholder { color: var(--muted); }

    /* SUMMARY */
    .summary { padding: 14px 20px; background: rgba(255,107,0,0.02); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .sum-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 5px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; }
    .sum-row.tot { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); margin-top: 8px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .sum-row.tot span:last-child { color: var(--brand); }
    .order-btn {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 9px;
      width: calc(100% - 40px); margin: 14px 20px 0;
      background: var(--brand);
      color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: var(--r); padding: 15px;
      font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(255,107,0,0.22); transition: var(--tr);
    }
    .order-btn:hover { background: var(--brand-hover); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(255, 107, 0, 0.3); }
    .order-btn:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
    .pad { height: 14px; }

    /* SUCCESS */
    .success {
      position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 500; background: var(--bg);
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 24px;
      transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
      transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);
      overflow-y: auto;
      color: var(--text);
    }
    .success.on { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }
    .check-wrap {
      width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10B981, #059669);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);
      animation: pop 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) 0.15s both;
    }
    @keyframes pop { from { transform: scale(0); } to { transform: scale(1); } }
    .s-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .s-sub { color: var(--muted); font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 24px; text-align: center; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; }
    .receipt {
      background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--r);
      padding: 18px; width: 100%; max-width: 340px; margin-bottom: 22px;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.04);
    }
    .r-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .r-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; }
    .r-tag { background: rgba(255,107,0,0.08); color: var(--brand); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 50px; }
    .r-id { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 10px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; }
    .r-div { border: none; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); margin: 8px 0; }
    .r-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 13px; padding: 3px 0; color: var(--text2); font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; }
    .r-total { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; margin-top: 6px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; }
    .r-total span:last-child { color: var(--brand); }
    .done-btn {
      background: var(--brand);
      color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: var(--r);
      padding: 13px 38px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255,107,0,0.2); transition: var(--tr);
    }
    .done-btn:hover { background: var(--brand-hover); }

    /* CONFETTI */
    #cc { position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 499; }

    /* INVALID */
    .invalid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 80vh; padding: 40px 20px; text-align: center; gap: 14px; }
    .invalid i { font-size: 56px; color: var(--brand); opacity: 0.45; }
    .invalid h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 21px; }
    .invalid p { color: var(--muted); max-width: 280px; }

    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 2px; }
  </style>
</head>

  <div class="check-wrap">
    <svg width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36" fill="none">
      <path d="M7 18L14.5 25.5L29 10" stroke="white" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </svg>
  </div>

      <div class="r-tag" id="r-table"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="r-id" id="r-id"></div>

<script src="/config.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2.49.8/dist/umd/supabase.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';

  // ── URL PARAMS ──
  const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
  const slug  = params.get('tenant') || params.get('outlet') || '';
  const tNum  = params.get('table') || '';

  function slugToName(s){ return s.replace(/-/g,' ').replace(/\b\w/g,c=>c.toUpperCase()).trim(); }
  const restName = slug ? slugToName(slug) : '';

  // ── BRANDING ──
  function applyLogoBranding(nameVal) {
    if(!nameVal) return;
    document.title = nameVal + ' | Order Online';
    const parts = nameVal.split(' ');
    const first = parts[0].toUpperCase();
    const rest = parts.slice(1).join(' ');
    
    document.getElementById('rest-name').innerHTML = 
      '<span class="logo-doppio">' + first + '</span>' + 
      (rest ? '<span class="logo-cafe">' + rest + '</span>' : '');
      
    document.getElementById('hero-sub').textContent = 'Order directly from your table at ' + nameVal + '. Fresh and fast!';
  }

  if(restName){
    applyLogoBranding(restName);
  } else {
    document.getElementById('rest-name').innerHTML = '<span class="logo-doppio">RESTAURANT</span>';
  }
  
  if(tNum){
    var pad = parseInt(tNum) < 10 ? '0'+tNum : tNum;
    document.getElementById('table-pill-txt').textContent = 'Table '+pad;
    document.getElementById('table-pill').style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('drawer-tag').textContent = 'Table '+pad;
  } else {
    document.getElementById('drawer-tag').textContent = 'Takeaway';
  }

  // ── VALIDATE ──
  if(!slug){
    document.getElementById('main').innerHTML = '<div class="invalid"><i class="fa-solid fa-qrcode"></i><h2>No Restaurant Found</h2><p>This page is only accessible by scanning a QR code from a table. Ask your server for help.</p></div>';
    document.getElementById('loader').remove();
    return;
  }

  // ── SUPABASE ──
  var sc = null;
  var SU = '';
  var SK = '';
  var FN = '';

  var configPromise = (window.__configReady || Promise.resolve()).then(function(){
    SU = window.__SUPABASE_URL__||'';
    SK = window.__SUPABASE_ANON_KEY__||'';
    FN = (window.location.hostname === 'localhost' || window.location.hostname === '127.0.0.1')
      ? '/functions/v1/tenant-public'
      : (SU ? SU+'/functions/v1/tenant-public' : '');
    if(typeof supabase!=='undefined' && SU){
      try{ sc = supabase.createClient(SU,SK); }catch(e){}
    }
  });

  function apiCall(action,extra){
    return configPromise.then(function(){
      if(!FN) return Promise.reject(new Error('no backend'));
      return fetch(FN,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','apikey':SK,'Authorization':'Bearer '+SK},
        body:JSON.stringify(Object.assign({action,tenant_slug:slug},extra||{}))})
        .then(function(r){ return r.json().catch(function(){return{};}); });
    });
  }

  // ── DEFAULT MENU ──
  var DEFAULT = [
    {name:'Iced Latte',price:249,category:'Cold Coffee',description:'Creamy chilled latte over ice.'},
    {name:'Iced Americano',price:229,category:'Cold Coffee',description:'Strong refreshing iced coffee.'},
    {name:'Mocha Frappe',price:279,category:'Cold Coffee',description:'Chocolate blended cold coffee.'},
    {name:'Cappuccino',price:229,category:'Hot Coffee',description:'Frothy coffee with latte art.'},
    {name:'Cafe Latte',price:229,category:'Hot Coffee',description:'Smooth creamy latte.'},
    {name:'Americano',price:209,category:'Hot Coffee',description:'Smooth black coffee.'},
    {name:'Iced Matcha Latte',price:329,category:'Matcha',description:'Refreshing green tea latte over ice.'},
    {name:'Iced Strawberry Matcha',price:349,category:'Matcha',description:'Strawberry matcha layered drink.'},
    {name:'Fries Peri Peri',price:269,category:'Fries',description:'Spicy seasoned fries.'},
    {name:'Fries Loaded',price:279,category:'Fries',description:'Cheese loaded fries.'},
    {name:'Mojito',price:329,category:'Mocktails',description:'Chilled mint and lime mocktail.'},
    {name:'Blue Lagoon',price:329,category:'Mocktails',description:'Sweet tropical blue mocktail.'},
    {name:'Nutella Thickshake',price:299,category:'Shakes',description:'Thick chocolate hazelnut shake.'},
    {name:'Oreo Thickshake',price:299,category:'Shakes',description:'Oreo loaded creamy shake.'},
    {name:'Cheese Garlic Toast',price:249,category:'Toasts',description:'Garlic bread with melted cheese.'},
    {name:'Classic Nachos',price:298,category:'Appetizers',description:'Nachos with cheese dip.'},
    {name:'Hot Chicken Wings',price:329,category:'Snacks',description:'Crispy spicy chicken wings.'},
    {name:'Alfredo Pasta',price:499,category:'Pasta',description:'Creamy white sauce penne pasta.'}
  ];

  var items = [];
  var cart  = [];
  var cat   = 'ALL';
  var q     = '';

  // ── LOAD ──
  function loadMenu(){
    var cacheKey = 'doppio_menu_cache_' + slug;
    var cachedData = null;
    try {
      cachedData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(cacheKey));
    } catch(e) {}

    if (cachedData && Array.isArray(cachedData.menu) && cachedData.menu.length > 0) {
      items = cachedData.menu;
      if (cachedData.tenantName) {
        applyLogoBranding(cachedData.tenantName);
      }
      buildUI();
    }

    if(sc){
      apiCall('list_menu').then(function(res){
        var data = Array.isArray(res.menu) ? res.menu : [];
        var newItems = [];
        if(data.length>0){
          newItems = data.map(function(i){
            return {name:i.name,price:parseInt(i.price)||0,category:i.category||'Other',description:i.description||'',image:i.image||'',bestseller:!!i.bestseller};
          });
        } else {
          newItems = [];
        }

        var menuChanged = JSON.stringify(items) !== JSON.stringify(newItems);
        var nameChanged = res.tenantName && res.tenantName !== 'Doppio Cafe' && (!cachedData || cachedData.tenantName !== res.tenantName);

        if (menuChanged || nameChanged || !cachedData) {
          items = newItems;
          if(res.tenantName && res.tenantName !== 'Doppio Cafe'){
            applyLogoBranding(res.tenantName);
          }
          
          try {
            localStorage.setItem(cacheKey, JSON.stringify({
              menu: items,
              tenantName: res.tenantName || restName
            }));
          } catch(e) {}

          if (!cachedData) {
            buildUI();
          } else {
            renderGrid();
          }
        }
      }).catch(function(){
        if (!cachedData) {
          items = [];
          buildUI();
        }
      });
    } else {
      if (!cachedData) {
        items = [];
        buildUI();
      }
    }
  }

  function buildUI(){
    if (items.length === 0) {
      document.getElementById('main').innerHTML =
        '<div class="empty" style="padding: 64px 24px; text-align: center; color: var(--text-mute);">' +
          '<i class="fa-solid fa-mug-hot" style="font-size: 32px; margin-bottom: 12px; opacity: 0.5;"></i>' +
          '<p style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; margin: 0 0 4px 0;">No menu items available</p>' +
          '<span style="font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.7;">Check back later once the outlet has published their menu!</span>' +
        '</div>';
      return;
    }
    var cats = ['ALL'];
    items.forEach(function(i){ if(cats.indexOf(i.category)===-1) cats.push(i.category); });
    var chipsHtml = cats.map(function(c){
      return '<button class="chip'+(c==='ALL'?' on':'')+'" onclick="setC(\''+c+'\',this)">'+
        (c==='ALL'?'All':c.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+c.slice(1).toLowerCase())+'</button>';
    }).join('');
    document.getElementById('main').innerHTML =
      '<div class="controls">'+
        '<div class="search-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i>'+
          '<input class="search-input" id="si" placeholder="Search menu..." oninput="setQ(this.value)"></div>'+
        '<div class="chips">'+chipsHtml+'</div>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<div class="grid" id="grid"></div>';
    renderGrid();
  }

  window.setC = function(c,btn){
    cat = c;
    document.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(function(b){ b.classList.remove('on'); });
    btn.classList.add('on');
    renderGrid();
  };
  window.setQ = function(v){ q=v; renderGrid(); };

  function renderGrid(){
    var grid = document.getElementById('grid');
    if(!grid) return;
    var list = items.filter(function(i){
      return (cat==='ALL'||i.category===cat) &&
        (!q || i.name.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()) || (i.description||'').toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()));
    });
    if(!list.length){
      grid.innerHTML = '<div class="empty"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i><p>No items found.<br>Try a different search!</p></div>';
      return;
    }
    grid.innerHTML = list.map(function(item){
      var inC = cart.find(function(c){ return c.name===item.name; });
      var qty = inC ? inC.qty : 0;
      var sn  = item.name.replace(/\\/g,'\\\\').replace(/'/g,"\\'");
      return '<div class="card" onclick="addItem(\''+sn+'\')">'+
        '<div class="card-bar"></div>'+
        (item.image ? '<img class="card-img show" src="'+item.image+'" alt="'+item.name+'" loading="lazy">' : '')+
        (item.bestseller ? '<span class="best-tag">Best Seller</span>' : '')+
        '<div class="card-body">'+
          '<div class="card-name">'+item.name+'</div>'+
          (item.description ? '<div class="card-desc">'+item.description+'</div>' : '')+
          '<div class="card-footer">'+
            '<span class="card-price">&#8377;'+item.price+'</span>'+
            (qty>0
              ? '<div class="qty-row" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">'+
                  '<button class="q-btn" onclick="chQty(\''+sn+'\',-1)">&#8722;</button>'+
                  '<span class="q-num">'+qty+'</span>'+
                  '<button class="q-btn plus" onclick="chQty(\''+sn+'\',1)">+</button>'+
                '</div>'
              : '<button class="add-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();addItem(\''+sn+'\')">'+
                  '<i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i></button>'
            )+
          '</div>'+
        '</div>'+
      '</div>';
    }).join('');
  }

  window.addItem = function(name){
    var item = items.find(function(i){ return i.name===name; });
    if(!item) return;
    var ex = cart.find(function(c){ return c.name===name; });
    if(ex){ ex.qty++; } else { cart.push({name:item.name,price:item.price,qty:1,category:item.category}); }
    updateFloat(); renderGrid(); bop();
  };
  window.chQty = function(name,d){
    var i = cart.findIndex(function(c){ return c.name===name; });
    if(i===-1) return;
    cart[i].qty+=d;
    if(cart[i].qty<=0) cart.splice(i,1);
    updateFloat(); renderGrid(); renderCartList(); calcSummary();
  };

  function updateFloat(){
    var tq = cart.reduce(function(s,i){return s+i.qty;},0);
    var tt = cart.reduce(function(s,i){return s+i.price*i.qty;},0);
    var btn = document.getElementById('float-btn');
    if(tq>0){
      btn.classList.add('show');
      document.getElementById('float-lbl').textContent = tq+' item'+(tq>1?'s':'');
      document.getElementById('float-tot').textContent = '\u20B9'+tt;
    } else {
      btn.classList.remove('show');
    }
  }
  function bop(){
    var b=document.getElementById('float-btn');
    b.style.transform='translateX(-50%) scale(1.1)';
    setTimeout(function(){b.style.transform='';},200);
  }

  window.openCart = function(){
    renderCartList(); calcSummary();
    document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('on');
    document.getElementById('drawer').classList.add('on');
    document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
    var sn=localStorage.getItem('rs_name')||'';
    var sp=localStorage.getItem('rs_phone')||'';
    if(sn) document.getElementById('cust-name').value=sn;
    if(sp) document.getElementById('cust-phone').value=sp;
  };
  window.closeCart = function(){
    document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('on');
    document.getElementById('drawer').classList.remove('on');
    document.body.style.overflow='';
  };

  function renderCartList(){
    var el = document.getElementById('cart-list');
    if(!cart.length){ el.innerHTML='<div class="cart-empty"><i class="fa-solid fa-basket-shopping"></i><p>Cart is empty</p></div>'; return; }
    el.innerHTML = cart.map(function(item){
      var sn = item.name.replace(/\\/g,'\\\\').replace(/'/g,"\\'");
      return '<div class="cart-row">'+
        '<div class="cart-info">'+
          '<div class="cart-name">'+item.name+'</div>'+
          '<div class="cart-unit">&#8377;'+item.price+' each</div>'+
        '</div>'+
        '<div class="cart-ctrl">'+
          '<button class="cc-btn" onclick="chQty(\''+sn+'\',-1)">&#8722;</button>'+
          '<span class="cc-qty">'+item.qty+'</span>'+
          '<button class="cc-btn p" onclick="chQty(\''+sn+'\',1)">+</button>'+
        '</div>'+
        '<div class="cart-total">&#8377;'+(item.price*item.qty)+'</div>'+
      '</div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function calcSummary(){
    var sub = cart.reduce(function(s,i){return s+i.price*i.qty;},0);
    var gst = Math.round(sub*0.1525);
    document.getElementById('s-sub').textContent = '\u20B9'+(sub-gst);
    document.getElementById('s-gst').textContent = '\u20B9'+gst;
    document.getElementById('s-tot').textContent = '\u20B9'+sub;
  }

  window.placeOrder = function(){
    var name  = (document.getElementById('cust-name').value||'').trim();
    var phone = (document.getElementById('cust-phone').value||'').trim();
    if(!name){
      var ni=document.getElementById('cust-name');
      ni.style.outline='2px solid #ff4444';
      ni.focus();
      setTimeout(function(){ni.style.outline='';},1500);
      return;
    }
    if(!cart.length) return;
    localStorage.setItem('rs_name',name);
    if(phone) localStorage.setItem('rs_phone',phone);
    var rid = 'DO-QR-' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase() + '-' + crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint32Array(1))[0].toString(36).toUpperCase();
    var tv  = tNum||'Takeaway';
    var sub = cart.reduce(function(s,i){return s+i.price*i.qty;},0);
    var gst = Math.round(sub*0.1525);
    var ts  = new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN');
    var order = {orderId:rid,customerName:name,customerPhone:phone||'Dine-in',dateTime:ts,
      items:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(cart)),subtotal:sub,discount:0,gst:gst,total:sub,
      paymentMethod:'Pending',orderType:tv==='Takeaway'?'Takeaway':'Dine-in',
      tableNumber:tv,tenant_slug:slug,status:'Pending Review'};
    if(sc){ apiCall('create_order',{order:Object.assign({},order,{items:JSON.stringify(cart)})}).catch(function(){}); }
    try{ var ch=new BroadcastChannel(slug+'_qr_orders'); ch.postMessage({type:'NEW_QR_ORDER',order:order}); ch.close(); }catch(e){}
    try{ var pq=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('doppio_pending_qr_orders')||'[]'); pq.push(order); localStorage.setItem('doppio_pending_qr_orders',JSON.stringify(pq)); }catch(e){}
    closeCart();
    showSuccess(order);
  };

  function showSuccess(order){
    var rn = document.getElementById('rest-name').textContent;
    document.getElementById('r-rest').textContent = rn;
    var pd = tNum && parseInt(tNum)<10 ? '0'+tNum : tNum;
    document.getElementById('r-table').textContent = tNum ? 'Table '+pd : 'Takeaway';
    document.getElementById('r-id').textContent = 'Order ID: '+order.orderId;
    document.getElementById('r-total').textContent = '\u20B9'+order.total;
    document.getElementById('r-items').innerHTML = order.items.map(function(i){
      return '<div class="r-item"><span>'+i.name+' x'+i.qty+'</span><span>\u20B9'+(i.price*i.qty)+'</span></div>';
    }).join('');
    document.getElementById('success').classList.add('on');
    confetti();
    try{
      var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
      [523.25,659.25,783.99,1046.5].forEach(function(f,i){
        setTimeout(function(){
          var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();
          o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);
          o.frequency.value=f;o.type='sine';
          g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.07,ac.currentTime);
          g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ac.currentTime+0.28);
          o.start();o.stop(ac.currentTime+0.28);
        },i*100);
      });
    }catch(e){}
  }

  window.resetOrder = function(){
    cart=[];
    document.getElementById('success').classList.remove('on');
    updateFloat(); renderGrid();
  };

  function confetti(){
    var cv=document.getElementById('cc');
    cv.width=innerWidth; cv.height=innerHeight;
    var cx=cv.getContext('2d');
    var cols=['#FF6B00','#E05E00','#FFD700','#10B981','#3b82f6','#ef4444','#fff'];
    var ps=Array.from({length:110},function(){return{
      x:innerWidth/2,y:innerHeight/2,
      vx:(Math.random()-0.5)*15,vy:(Math.random()-0.85)*13-4,
      r:Math.random()*5+4,c:cols[Math.floor(Math.random()*cols.length)],
      rot:Math.random()*360,rs:(Math.random()-0.5)*12,op:1
    };});
    function loop(){
      cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
      var alive=false;
      ps.forEach(function(p){
        p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.vy+=0.29;p.vx*=0.99;p.rot+=p.rs;p.op-=0.007;
        if(p.op>0){
          alive=true;cx.save();cx.globalAlpha=p.op;
          cx.translate(p.x,p.y);cx.rotate(p.rot*Math.PI/180);cx.fillStyle=p.c;
          p.r%2===0?cx.fillRect(-p.r,-p.r,p.r*2,p.r*1.5):(cx.beginPath(),cx.arc(0,0,p.r,0,Math.PI*2),cx.fill());
          cx.restore();
        }
      });
      alive?requestAnimationFrame(loop):cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    }
    loop();
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Escape') closeCart(); });

  configPromise.then(function(){
    loadMenu();
  });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

    .r-total span:last-child { color: var(--brand); }
    .done-btn {
      background: var(--brand);
      color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: var(--r);
      padding: 13px 38px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255,107,0,0.2); transition: var(--tr);
    }
    .done-btn:hover { background: var(--brand-hover); }

    /* CONFETTI */
    #cc { position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 499; }

    /* INVALID */
    .invalid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 80vh; padding: 40px 20px; text-align: center; gap: 14px; }
    .invalid i { font-size: 56px; color: var(--brand); opacity: 0.45; }
    .invalid h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 21px; }
    .invalid p { color: var(--muted); max-width: 280px; }

    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 2px; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

    <i class="fa-solid fa-chair"></i>
    <span id="table-pill-txt">Table</span>

    <h4>Your Details</h4>
    <div class="field"><i class="fa-solid fa-user"></i><input type="text" id="cust-name" placeholder="Your Name (required)"></div>
    <div class="field"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><input type="tel" id="cust-phone" placeholder="Phone (optional)" maxlength="10"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="summary">
    <div class="sum-row"><span>Subtotal</span><span id="s-sub">&#8377;0</span></div>
    <div class="sum-row"><span>GST (incl.)</span><span id="s-gst">&#8377;0</span></div>
    <div class="sum-row tot"><span>Total</span><span id="s-tot">&#8377;0</span></div>

    <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane"></i> Place Order
  </button>
  <div class="pad"></div>

<!-- SUCCESS -->
<div class="success" id="success">
  <div class="check-wrap">
    <svg width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36" fill="none">
      <path d="M7 18L14.5 25.5L29 10" stroke="white" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
  <div class="s-title">Order Placed!</div>
  <div class="s-sub" id="s-msg">Your order is heading to the kitchen!</div>
  <div class="receipt">
    <div class="r-top">
      <div class="r-name" id="r-rest"></div>
      <div class="r-tag" id="r-table"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="r-id" id="r-id"></div>
    <hr class="r-div">
    <div id="r-items"></div>
    <hr class="r-div">
    <div class="r-total"><span>Total Paid</span><span id="r-total"></span></div>
  </div>
  <button class="done-btn" onclick="resetOrder()">Done, Thanks!</button>
</div>

<script src="/config.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2.49.8/dist/umd/supabase.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';

  // ── URL PARAMS ──
  const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
  const slug  = params.get('tenant') || params.get('outlet') || '';
  const tNum  = params.get('table') || '';

  function slugToName(s){ return s.replace(/-/g,' ').replace(/\b\w/g,c=>c.toUpperCase()).trim(); }
  const restName = slug ? slugToName(slug) : '';

  // ── BRANDING ──
  function applyLogoBranding(nameVal) {
    if(!nameVal) return;
    document.title = nameVal + ' | Order Online';
    const parts = nameVal.split(' ');
    const first = parts[0].toUpperCase();
    const rest = parts.slice(1).join(' ');
    
    document.getElementById('rest-name').innerHTML = 
      '<span class="logo-doppio">' + first + '</span>' + 
      (rest ? '<span class="logo-cafe">' + rest + '</span>' : '');
      
    document.getElementById('hero-sub').textContent = 'Order directly from your table at ' + nameVal + '. Fresh and fast!';
  }

  if(restName){
    applyLogoBranding(restName);
  } else {
    document.getElementById('rest-name').innerHTML = '<span class="logo-doppio">RESTAURANT</span>';
  }
  
  if(tNum){
    var pad = parseInt(tNum) < 10 ? '0'+tNum : tNum;
    document.getElementById('table-pill-txt').textContent = 'Table '+pad;
    document.getElementById('table-pill').style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('drawer-tag').textContent = 'Table '+pad;
  } else {
    document.getElementById('drawer-tag').textContent = 'Takeaway';
  }

  // ── VALIDATE ──
  if(!slug){
    document.getElementById('main').innerHTML = '<div class="invalid"><i class="fa-solid fa-qrcode"></i><h2>No Restaurant Found</h2><p>This page is only accessible by scanning a QR code from a table. Ask your server for help.</p></div>';
    document.getElementById('loader').remove();
    return;
  }

  // ── SUPABASE ──
  var sc = null;
  var SU = '';
  var SK = '';
  var FN = '';

  var configPromise = (window.__configReady || Promise.resolve()).then(function(){
    SU = window.__SUPABASE_URL__||'';
    SK = window.__SUPABASE_ANON_KEY__||'';
    FN = (window.location.hostname === 'localhost' || window.location.hostname === '127.0.0.1')
      ? '/functions/v1/tenant-public'
      : (SU ? SU+'/functions/v1/tenant-public' : '');
    if(typeof supabase!=='undefined' && SU){
      try{ sc = supabase.createClient(SU,SK); }catch(e){}
    }
  });

  function apiCall(action,extra){
    return configPromise.then(function(){
      if(!FN) return Promise.reject(new Error('no backend'));
      return fetch(FN,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','apikey':SK,'Authorization':'Bearer '+SK},
        body:JSON.stringify(Object.assign({action,tenant_slug:slug},extra||{}))})
        .then(function(r){ return r.json().catch(function(){return{};}); });
    });
  }

  // ── DEFAULT MENU ──
  var DEFAULT = [
    {name:'Iced Latte',price:249,category:'Cold Coffee',description:'Creamy chilled latte over ice.'},
    {name:'Iced Americano',price:229,category:'Cold Coffee',description:'Strong refreshing iced coffee.'},
    {name:'Mocha Frappe',price:279,category:'Cold Coffee',description:'Chocolate blended cold coffee.'},
    {name:'Cappuccino',price:229,category:'Hot Coffee',description:'Frothy coffee with latte art.'},
    {name:'Cafe Latte',price:229,category:'Hot Coffee',description:'Smooth creamy latte.'},
    {name:'Americano',price:209,category:'Hot Coffee',description:'Smooth black coffee.'},
    {name:'Iced Matcha Latte',price:329,category:'Matcha',description:'Refreshing green tea latte over ice.'},
    {name:'Iced Strawberry Matcha',price:349,category:'Matcha',description:'Strawberry matcha layered drink.'},
    {name:'Fries Peri Peri',price:269,category:'Fries',description:'Spicy seasoned fries.'},
    {name:'Fries Loaded',price:279,category:'Fries',description:'Cheese loaded fries.'},
    {name:'Mojito',price:329,category:'Mocktails',description:'Chilled mint and lime mocktail.'},
    {name:'Blue Lagoon',price:329,category:'Mocktails',description:'Sweet tropical blue mocktail.'},
    {name:'Nutella Thickshake',price:299,category:'Shakes',description:'Thick chocolate hazelnut shake.'},
    {name:'Oreo Thickshake',price:299,category:'Shakes',description:'Oreo loaded creamy shake.'},
    {name:'Cheese Garlic Toast',price:249,category:'Toasts',description:'Garlic bread with melted cheese.'},
    {name:'Classic Nachos',price:298,category:'Appetizers',description:'Nachos with cheese dip.'},
    {name:'Hot Chicken Wings',price:329,category:'Snacks',description:'Crispy spicy chicken wings.'},
    {name:'Alfredo Pasta',price:499,category:'Pasta',description:'Creamy white sauce penne pasta.'}
  ];

  var items = [];
  var cart  = [];
  var cat   = 'ALL';
  var q     = '';

  // ── LOAD ──
  function loadMenu(){
    var cacheKey = 'doppio_menu_cache_' + slug;
    var cachedData = null;
    try {
      cachedData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(cacheKey));
    } catch(e) {}

    if (cachedData && Array.isArray(cachedData.menu) && cachedData.menu.length > 0) {
      items = cachedData.menu;
      if (cachedData.tenantName) {
        applyLogoBranding(cachedData.tenantName);
      }
      buildUI();
    }

    if(sc){
      apiCall('list_menu').then(function(res){
        var data = Array.isArray(res.menu) ? res.menu : [];
        var newItems = [];
        if(data.length>0){
          newItems = data.map(function(i){
            return {name:i.name,price:parseInt(i.price)||0,category:i.category||'Other',description:i.description||'',image:i.image||'',bestseller:!!i.bestseller};
          });
        } else {
          newItems = [];
        }

        var menuChanged = JSON.stringify(items) !== JSON.stringify(newItems);
        var nameChanged = res.tenantName && res.tenantName !== 'Doppio Cafe' && (!cachedData || cachedData.tenantName !== res.tenantName);

        if (menuChanged || nameChanged || !cachedData) {
          items = newItems;
          if(res.tenantName && res.tenantName !== 'Doppio Cafe'){
            applyLogoBranding(res.tenantName);
          }
          
          try {
            localStorage.setItem(cacheKey, JSON.stringify({
              menu: items,
              tenantName: res.tenantName || restName
            }));
          } catch(e) {}

          if (!cachedData) {
            buildUI();
          } else {
            renderGrid();
          }
        }
      }).catch(function(){
        if (!cachedData) {
          items = [];
          buildUI();
        }
      });
    } else {
      if (!cachedData) {
        items = [];
        buildUI();
      }
    }
  }

  function buildUI(){
    if (items.length === 0) {
      document.getElementById('main').innerHTML =
        '<div class="empty" style="padding: 64px 24px; text-align: center; color: var(--text-mute);">' +
          '<i class="fa-solid fa-mug-hot" style="font-size: 32px; margin-bottom: 12px; opacity: 0.5;"></i>' +
          '<p style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; margin: 0 0 4px 0;">No menu items available</p>' +
          '<span style="font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.7;">Check back later once the outlet has published their menu!</span>' +
        '</div>';
      return;
    }
    var cats = ['ALL'];
    items.forEach(function(i){ if(cats.indexOf(i.category)===-1) cats.push(i.category); });
    var chipsHtml = cats.map(function(c){
      return '<button class="chip'+(c==='ALL'?' on':'')+'" onclick="setC(\''+c+'\',this)">'+
        (c==='ALL'?'All':c.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+c.slice(1).toLowerCase())+'</button>';
    }).join('');
    document.getElementById('main').innerHTML =
      '<div class="controls">'+
        '<div class="search-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i>'+
          '<input class="search-input" id="si" placeholder="Search menu..." oninput="setQ(this.value)"></div>'+
        '<div class="chips">'+chipsHtml+'</div>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<div class="grid" id="grid"></div>';
    renderGrid();
  }

  window.setC = function(c,btn){
    cat = c;
    document.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(function(b){ b.classList.remove('on'); });
    btn.classList.add('on');
    renderGrid();
  };
  window.setQ = function(v){ q=v; renderGrid(); };

  function renderGrid(){
    var grid = document.getElementById('grid');
    if(!grid) return;
    var list = items.filter(function(i){
      return (cat==='ALL'||i.category===cat) &&
        (!q || i.name.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()) || (i.description||'').toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()));
    });
    if(!list.length){
      grid.innerHTML = '<div class="empty"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i><p>No items found.<br>Try a different search!</p></div>';
      return;
    }
    grid.innerHTML = list.map(function(item){
      var inC = cart.find(function(c){ return c.name===item.name; });
      var qty = inC ? inC.qty : 0;
      var sn  = item.name.replace(/\\/g,'\\\\').replace(/'/g,"\\'");
      return '<div class="card" onclick="addItem(\''+sn+'\')">'+
        '<div class="card-bar"></div>'+
        (item.image ? '<img class="card-img show" src="'+item.image+'" alt="'+item.name+'" loading="lazy">' : '')+
        (item.bestseller ? '<span class="best-tag">Best Seller</span>' : '')+
        '<div class="card-body">'+
          '<div class="card-name">'+item.name+'</div>'+
          (item.description ? '<div class="card-desc">'+item.description+'</div>' : '')+
          '<div class="card-footer">'+
            '<span class="card-price">&#8377;'+item.price+'</span>'+
            (qty>0
              ? '<div class="qty-row" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">'+
                  '<button class="q-btn" onclick="chQty(\''+sn+'\',-1)">&#8722;</button>'+
                  '<span class="q-num">'+qty+'</span>'+
                  '<button class="q-btn plus" onclick="chQty(\''+sn+'\',1)">+</button>'+
                '</div>'
              : '<button class="add-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();addItem(\''+sn+'\')">'+
                  '<i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i></button>'
            )+
          '</div>'+
        '</div>'+
      '</div>';
    }).join('');
  }

  window.addItem = function(name){
    var item = items.find(function(i){ return i.name===name; });
    if(!item) return;
    var ex = cart.find(function(c){ return c.name===name; });
    if(ex){ ex.qty++; } else { cart.push({name:item.name,price:item.price,qty:1,category:item.category}); }
    updateFloat(); renderGrid(); bop();
  };
  window.chQty = function(name,d){
    var i = cart.findIndex(function(c){ return c.name===name; });
    if(i===-1) return;
    cart[i].qty+=d;
    if(cart[i].qty<=0) cart.splice(i,1);
    updateFloat(); renderGrid(); renderCartList(); calcSummary();
  };

  function updateFloat(){
    var tq = cart.reduce(function(s,i){return s+i.qty;},0);
    var tt = cart.reduce(function(s,i){return s+i.price*i.qty;},0);
    var btn = document.getElementById('float-btn');
    if(tq>0){
      btn.classList.add('show');
      document.getElementById('float-lbl').textContent = tq+' item'+(tq>1?'s':'');
      document.getElementById('float-tot').textContent = '\u20B9'+tt;
    } else {
      btn.classList.remove('show');
    }
  }
  function bop(){
    var b=document.getElementById('float-btn');
    b.style.transform='translateX(-50%) scale(1.1)';
    setTimeout(function(){b.style.transform='';},200);
  }

  window.openCart = function(){
    renderCartList(); calcSummary();
    document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('on');
    document.getElementById('drawer').classList.add('on');
    document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
    var sn=localStorage.getItem('rs_name')||'';
    var sp=localStorage.getItem('rs_phone')||'';
    if(sn) document.getElementById('cust-name').value=sn;
    if(sp) document.getElementById('cust-phone').value=sp;
  };
  window.closeCart = function(){
    document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('on');
    document.getElementById('drawer').classList.remove('on');
    document.body.style.overflow='';
  };

  function renderCartList(){
    var el = document.getElementById('cart-list');
    if(!cart.length){ el.innerHTML='<div class="cart-empty"><i class="fa-solid fa-basket-shopping"></i><p>Cart is empty</p></div>'; return; }
    el.innerHTML = cart.map(function(item){
      var sn = item.name.replace(/\\/g,'\\\\').replace(/'/g,"\\'");
      return '<div class="cart-row">'+
        '<div class="cart-info">'+
          '<div class="cart-name">'+item.name+'</div>'+
          '<div class="cart-unit">&#8377;'+item.price+' each</div>'+
        '</div>'+
        '<div class="cart-ctrl">'+
          '<button class="cc-btn" onclick="chQty(\''+sn+'\',-1)">&#8722;</button>'+
          '<span class="cc-qty">'+item.qty+'</span>'+
          '<button class="cc-btn p" onclick="chQty(\''+sn+'\',1)">+</button>'+
        '</div>'+
        '<div class="cart-total">&#8377;'+(item.price*item.qty)+'</div>'+
      '</div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function calcSummary(){
    var sub = cart.reduce(function(s,i){return s+i.price*i.qty;},0);
    var gst = Math.round(sub*0.1525);
    document.getElementById('s-sub').textContent = '\u20B9'+(sub-gst);
    document.getElementById('s-gst').textContent = '\u20B9'+gst;
    document.getElementById('s-tot').textContent = '\u20B9'+sub;
  }

  window.placeOrder = function(){
    var name  = (document.getElementById('cust-name').value||'').trim();
    var phone = (document.getElementById('cust-phone').value||'').trim();
    if(!name){
      var ni=document.getElementById('cust-name');
      ni.style.outline='2px solid #ff4444';
      ni.focus();
      setTimeout(function(){ni.style.outline='';},1500);
      return;
    }
    if(!cart.length) return;
    localStorage.setItem('rs_name',name);
    if(phone) localStorage.setItem('rs_phone',phone);
    var rid = 'DO-QR-' + Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase() + '-' + crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint32Array(1))[0].toString(36).toUpperCase();
    var tv  = tNum||'Takeaway';
    var sub = cart.reduce(function(s,i){return s+i.price*i.qty;},0);
    var gst = Math.round(sub*0.1525);
    var ts  = new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN');
    var order = {orderId:rid,customerName:name,customerPhone:phone||'Dine-in',dateTime:ts,
      items:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(cart)),subtotal:sub,discount:0,gst:gst,total:sub,
      paymentMethod:'Pending',orderType:tv==='Takeaway'?'Takeaway':'Dine-in',
      tableNumber:tv,tenant_slug:slug,status:'Pending Review'};
    if(sc){ apiCall('create_order',{order:Object.assign({},order,{items:JSON.stringify(cart)})}).catch(function(){}); }
    try{ var ch=new BroadcastChannel(slug+'_qr_orders'); ch.postMessage({type:'NEW_QR_ORDER',order:order}); ch.close(); }catch(e){}
    try{ var pq=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('doppio_pending_qr_orders')||'[]'); pq.push(order); localStorage.setItem('doppio_pending_qr_orders',JSON.stringify(pq)); }catch(e){}
    closeCart();
    showSuccess(order);
  };

  function showSuccess(order){
    var rn = document.getElementById('rest-name').textContent;
    document.getElementById('r-rest').textContent = rn;
    var pd = tNum && parseInt(tNum)<10 ? '0'+tNum : tNum;
    document.getElementById('r-table').textContent = tNum ? 'Table '+pd : 'Takeaway';
    document.getElementById('r-id').textContent = 'Order ID: '+order.orderId;
    document.getElementById('r-total').textContent = '\u20B9'+order.total;
    document.getElementById('r-items').innerHTML = order.items.map(function(i){
      return '<div class="r-item"><span>'+i.name+' x'+i.qty+'</span><span>\u20B9'+(i.price*i.qty)+'</span></div>';
    }).join('');
    document.getElementById('success').classList.add('on');
    confetti();
    try{
      var ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
      [523.25,659.25,783.99,1046.5].forEach(function(f,i){
        setTimeout(function(){
          var o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();
          o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);
          o.frequency.value=f;o.type='sine';
          g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.07,ac.currentTime);
          g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ac.currentTime+0.28);
          o.start();o.stop(ac.currentTime+0.28);
        },i*100);
      });
    }catch(e){}
  }

  window.resetOrder = function(){
    cart=[];
    document.getElementById('success').classList.remove('on');
    updateFloat(); renderGrid();
  };

  function confetti(){
    var cv=document.getElementById('cc');
    cv.width=innerWidth; cv.height=innerHeight;
    var cx=cv.getContext('2d');
    var cols=['#FF6B00','#E05E00','#FFD700','#10B981','#3b82f6','#ef4444','#fff'];
    var ps=Array.from({length:110},function(){return{
      x:innerWidth/2,y:innerHeight/2,
      vx:(Math.random()-0.5)*15,vy:(Math.random()-0.85)*13-4,
      r:Math.random()*5+4,c:cols[Math.floor(Math.random()*cols.length)],
      rot:Math.random()*360,rs:(Math.random()-0.5)*12,op:1
    };});
    function loop(){
      cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
      var alive=false;
      ps.forEach(function(p){
        p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.vy+=0.29;p.vx*=0.99;p.rot+=p.rs;p.op-=0.007;
        if(p.op>0){
          alive=true;cx.save();cx.globalAlpha=p.op;
          cx.translate(p.x,p.y);cx.rotate(p.rot*Math.PI/180);cx.fillStyle=p.c;
          p.r%2===0?cx.fillRect(-p.r,-p.r,p.r*2,p.r*1.5):(cx.beginPath(),cx.arc(0,0,p.r,0,Math.PI*2),cx.fill());
          cx.restore();
        }
      });
      alive?requestAnimationFrame(loop):cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
    }
    loop();
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Escape') closeCart(); });

  configPromise.then(function(){
    loadMenu();
  });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

  <div class="modal-overlay" id="sim-modal">
    <div class="modal-card glass">
      <div class="modal-icon"><i class="fa-brands fa-whatsapp"></i></div>
      <h3 id="sim-modal-title">WhatsApp bill dispatched</h3>
      <p id="sim-modal-desc">Simulated invoice for ₹<span id="sim-modal-total">0</span> sent via the RestroSuite gateway.</p>
