  <script>
    // ===== THEME (shared rs-theme key across all pages) =====
    (function(){
      const root = document.documentElement;
      const btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
      const icon = btn ? btn.querySelector('i') : null;
      function apply(t){ root.setAttribute('data-theme', t); if(icon) icon.className = t==='dark'?'fa-solid fa-moon':'fa-solid fa-sun'; try{ localStorage.setItem('rs-theme', t); }catch(e){} }
      apply((()=>{ try{ return localStorage.getItem('rs-theme')||'light'; }catch(e){ return 'light'; } })());
      btn && btn.addEventListener('click', ()=> apply(root.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark'?'light':'dark'));
    })();
  </script>
  <script>
    // Header scroll state
    const header = document.getElementById('site-header');
    const onScroll = () => header.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 20);
    onScroll(); window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });

    // ===== POS SIMULATOR =====
    let simCart = {};
    function addToSimCart(name, price) {
      if (simCart[name]) simCart[name].qty++; else simCart[name] = { price, qty: 1 };
      renderSimCart();
    }
    function changeQty(name, amount) {
      if (!simCart[name]) return;
      simCart[name].qty += amount;
      if (simCart[name].qty <= 0) delete simCart[name];
      renderSimCart();
    }
    function renderSimCart() {
      const container = document.getElementById('sim-cart-content');
      const actions = document.getElementById('sandbox-actions');
      const btnReal = document.getElementById('btn-send-real');
      const btnSim = document.getElementById('btn-trigger-sim');
      let itemsHtml = '', subtotal = 0, totalItems = 0;
      for (const name in simCart) {
        const it = simCart[name], lineTotal = it.price * it.qty;
        subtotal += lineTotal; totalItems += it.qty;
        itemsHtml += `<div class="receipt-row">
          <div><div class="ri-name">${name}</div>
            <div class="ri-meta">
              <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty('${name}',-1)"><i class="fa-solid fa-minus"></i></button>
              <span>${it.qty} × ₹${it.price}</span>
              <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty('${name}',1)"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i></button>
            </div></div>
          <div class="ri-amt">₹${lineTotal}</div></div>`;
      }
      if (totalItems === 0) {
        container.className = 'empty-cart-msg';
        container.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-receipt"></i>Your receipt is empty.<br>Tap menu items to start a bill.';
        if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none';
        return;
      }
      const tax = Math.round(subtotal * 0.05), finalTotal = subtotal + tax;
      container.className = '';
      container.innerHTML = `<div class="receipt-list">${itemsHtml}</div>
        <div class="receipt-summary">
          <div class="sum-row"><span>Subtotal</span><span>₹${subtotal}</span></div>
          <div class="sum-row"><span>GST (5%)</span><span>₹${tax}</span></div>
          <div class="sum-total"><span>Total</span><span>₹${finalTotal}</span></div>
        </div>`;
      if (actions) { actions.style.display = 'flex'; }
      if (btnReal) btnReal.dataset.total = finalTotal;
      if (btnSim) btnSim.dataset.total = finalTotal;
      validateSandboxPhone();
    }
    function validateSandboxPhone() {
      const phone = document.getElementById('sandbox-phone'), btn = document.getElementById('btn-send-real');
      if (!phone || !btn) return;
      btn.disabled = phone.value.replace(/\D/g, '').length !== 10;
    }
    function showModal(title, desc) {
      document.getElementById('sim-modal-title').innerText = title;
      document.getElementById('sim-modal-desc').innerHTML = desc;
      document.getElementById('sim-modal').classList.add('show');
    }
    function sendRealWhatsAppReceipt() {
      const phone = document.getElementById('sandbox-phone');
      const num = phone.value.replace(/\D/g, '');
      showModal('WhatsApp bill dispatched!', `A real-time invoice was sent to <b>+91 ${num}</b> from our WhatsApp gateway. Check your phone!`);
      simCart = {}; phone.value = ''; renderSimCart(); validateSandboxPhone();
    }
    function triggerSimulatedReceipt() {
      const total = document.getElementById('btn-trigger-sim').dataset.total || '0';
      showModal('Bill printed &amp; closed', `Receipt for ₹<b>${total}</b> printed to the thermal printer and queued to the kitchen display.`);
      simCart = {}; renderSimCart();
    }
    function closeSimModal() { document.getElementById('sim-modal').classList.remove('show'); }
    document.getElementById('sim-modal').addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target.id === 'sim-modal') closeSimModal(); });

    // ===== TESTIMONIALS CAROUSEL =====
    let testiIndex = 0;
    const testiTrack = document.getElementById('testi-track');
    const testiCount = testiTrack.children.length;
    const dotsWrap = document.getElementById('testi-dots');
    for (let i = 0; i < testiCount; i++) {
      const b = document.createElement('button');
      b.onclick = () => goTesti(i);
      dotsWrap.appendChild(b);
    }
    function renderTesti() {
      testiTrack.style.transform = `translateX(-${testiIndex * 100}%)`;
      [...dotsWrap.children].forEach((d, i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i === testiIndex));
    }
    function goTesti(i) { testiIndex = (i + testiCount) % testiCount; renderTesti(); }
    function moveTesti(dir) { goTesti(testiIndex + dir); }
    renderTesti();
    let testiTimer = setInterval(() => moveTesti(1), 6000);
    testiTrack.addEventListener('pointerenter', () => clearInterval(testiTimer));
  </script>
</body>
</html>

  <script>
    // ===== THEME (shared rs-theme key across all pages) =====
    (function(){
      const root = document.documentElement;
      const btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
      const icon = btn ? btn.querySelector('i') : null;
      function apply(t){ root.setAttribute('data-theme', t); if(icon) icon.className = t==='dark'?'fa-solid fa-moon':'fa-solid fa-sun'; try{ localStorage.setItem('rs-theme', t); }catch(e){} }
      apply((()=>{ try{ return localStorage.getItem('rs-theme')||'light'; }catch(e){ return 'light'; } })());
      btn && btn.addEventListener('click', ()=> apply(root.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark'?'light':'dark'));
    })();
  </script>
  <script>
    // Header scroll state
    const header = document.getElementById('site-header');
    const onScroll = () => header.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 20);
    onScroll(); window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });

    // ===== POS SIMULATOR =====
    let simCart = {};
    function addToSimCart(name, price) {
      if (simCart[name]) simCart[name].qty++; else simCart[name] = { price, qty: 1 };
      renderSimCart();
    }
    function changeQty(name, amount) {
      if (!simCart[name]) return;
      simCart[name].qty += amount;
      if (simCart[name].qty <= 0) delete simCart[name];
      renderSimCart();
    }
    function renderSimCart() {
      const container = document.getElementById('sim-cart-content');
      const actions = document.getElementById('sandbox-actions');
      const btnReal = document.getElementById('btn-send-real');
      const btnSim = document.getElementById('btn-trigger-sim');
      let itemsHtml = '', subtotal = 0, totalItems = 0;
      for (const name in simCart) {
        const it = simCart[name], lineTotal = it.price * it.qty;
        subtotal += lineTotal; totalItems += it.qty;
        itemsHtml += `<div class="receipt-row">
          <div><div class="ri-name">${name}</div>
            <div class="ri-meta">
              <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty('${name}',-1)"><i class="fa-solid fa-minus"></i></button>
              <span>${it.qty} × ₹${it.price}</span>
              <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty('${name}',1)"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i></button>
            </div></div>
          <div class="ri-amt">₹${lineTotal}</div></div>`;
      }
      if (totalItems === 0) {
        container.className = 'empty-cart-msg';
        container.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-receipt"></i>Your receipt is empty.<br>Tap menu items to start a bill.';
        if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none';
        return;
      }
      const tax = Math.round(subtotal * 0.05), finalTotal = subtotal + tax;
      container.className = '';
      container.innerHTML = `<div class="receipt-list">${itemsHtml}</div>
        <div class="receipt-summary">
          <div class="sum-row"><span>Subtotal</span><span>₹${subtotal}</span></div>
          <div class="sum-row"><span>GST (5%)</span><span>₹${tax}</span></div>
          <div class="sum-total"><span>Total</span><span>₹${finalTotal}</span></div>
        </div>`;
      if (actions) { actions.style.display = 'flex'; }
      if (btnReal) btnReal.dataset.total = finalTotal;
      if (btnSim) btnSim.dataset.total = finalTotal;
      validateSandboxPhone();
    }
    function validateSandboxPhone() {
      const phone = document.getElementById('sandbox-phone'), btn = document.getElementById('btn-send-real');
      if (!phone || !btn) return;
      btn.disabled = phone.value.replace(/\D/g, '').length !== 10;
    }
    function showModal(title, desc) {
      document.getElementById('sim-modal-title').innerText = title;
      document.getElementById('sim-modal-desc').innerHTML = desc;
      document.getElementById('sim-modal').classList.add('show');
    }
    function sendRealWhatsAppReceipt() {
      const phone = document.getElementById('sandbox-phone');
      const num = phone.value.replace(/\D/g, '');
      showModal('WhatsApp bill dispatched!', `A real-time invoice was sent to <b>+91 ${num}</b> from our WhatsApp gateway. Check your phone!`);
      simCart = {}; phone.value = ''; renderSimCart(); validateSandboxPhone();
    }
    function triggerSimulatedReceipt() {
      const total = document.getElementById('btn-trigger-sim').dataset.total || '0';
      showModal('Bill printed &amp; closed', `Receipt for ₹<b>${total}</b> printed to the thermal printer and queued to the kitchen display.`);
      simCart = {}; renderSimCart();
    }
    function closeSimModal() { document.getElementById('sim-modal').classList.remove('show'); }
    document.getElementById('sim-modal').addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target.id === 'sim-modal') closeSimModal(); });

    // ===== TESTIMONIALS CAROUSEL =====
    let testiIndex = 0;
    const testiTrack = document.getElementById('testi-track');
    const testiCount = testiTrack.children.length;
    const dotsWrap = document.getElementById('testi-dots');
    for (let i = 0; i < testiCount; i++) {
      const b = document.createElement('button');
      b.onclick = () => goTesti(i);
      dotsWrap.appendChild(b);
    }
    function renderTesti() {
      testiTrack.style.transform = `translateX(-${testiIndex * 100}%)`;
      [...dotsWrap.children].forEach((d, i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i === testiIndex));
    }
    function goTesti(i) { testiIndex = (i + testiCount) % testiCount; renderTesti(); }
    function moveTesti(dir) { goTesti(testiIndex + dir); }
    renderTesti();
    let testiTimer = setInterval(() => moveTesti(1), 6000);
    testiTrack.addEventListener('pointerenter', () => clearInterval(testiTimer));
  </script>
</body>
</html>
